steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Label the side pair for the named angle first: opposite, adjacent, and hypotenuse. Then pick the matching shortcut, such as SOH/CAH/TOA, complementary trig values, or a special right-triangle ratio.

steps.title: Use the period of sine
steps.content: Sine has period $2\pi$, so $\sin\theta$ is unchanged when $\theta$ shifts by any integer multiple of $2\pi$. Since $18\pi = 9(2\pi)$, we have $$\sin 18\pi = \sin 0.$$

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: $\sin 0 = 0$, so $\sin 18\pi = 0$. That is the correct answer.
